structured_data.name: OrbisLocal
structured_data.description: AI-Powered Local Visibility Intelligence. We analyze Google Business Profiles for Revenue at Risk and entity clarity.

mainEntity.name: What is local visibility and why does it matter?

acceptedAnswer.text: Local visibility measures how often and where your business appears when nearby customers search for your services. 46% of all Google searches are seeking local information. If you're not visible in the Google Map Pack (top 3 results), you're losing nearly a third of potential customers to competitors who are.

mainEntity.name: How is OrbisLocal different from regular rank trackers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Traditional rank trackers check a single search result from one location. OrbisLocal scans a 7×7 grid (49 points) across your entire service radius, audits your Google Business Profile, checks your website alignment, verifies citation consistency, and calculates your actual Revenue at Risk in dollars — not just positions.

Revenue at Risk is our proprietary metric that calculates how much money your business is losing due to poor visibility. We use your service radius, local search volume, Map Pack click-through rates, and your industry's average customer value to produce a concrete dollar amount.

mainEntity.name: How long does a visibility scan take?

acceptedAnswer.text: A full BISON Strategic Analysis takes approximately 2–5 minutes. This includes scanning 49 grid points, fetching your top 20 competitors, auditing your GBP profile, analyzing your website, and generating an AI-powered executive summary.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to give you access to my Google account?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. OrbisLocal uses publicly available data from Google Maps, your website, and citation directories. We never need access to your Google, Analytics, or Search Console accounts.

mainEntity.name: What is the AI Retrieval Likelihood score?

acceptedAnswer.text: As AI assistants like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity increasingly answer local search queries, your business needs to be 'retrievable' by these models. Our Entity Clarity score measures how well AI models understand your business services, categories, and location — and how likely they are to recommend you.
